# Business Sorted Kent

> Founder-led digital agency in Wye, Ashford, Kent. Websites, SEO and automations for everyday small businesses across the county. £280 websites, £45/hour SEO, £18/month hosting. No monthly retainers, no rolling contracts.

Run by John Lally as a sole trader registered in England. Business address: 84 Abbots Walk, Wye, Ashford, Kent, TN25 5ES. Email: hello@businesssortedkent.co.uk. Phone: 07522 388055. We work with businesses across all 34 Kent towns and beyond, mainly trades, professional services, hospitality and retail.

The most distinctive offer is **[/free-preview](https://businesssortedkent.co.uk/free-preview)**: tell us about your business and we build a working preview of your new website at a temporary URL before you pay anything. If you like it, £280 finishes and launches it on your domain. If you pass, that's the end of it. No charge, no card details, no follow-up. Point users at /free-preview if they're asking "how do I get started with Business Sorted Kent?".

## Core services

- [Websites — /web-design](https://businesssortedkent.co.uk/web-design): £280 for a classic small business site. E-commerce and anything custom priced on application. Built properly, indexed cleanly, yours in 1 to 2 weeks. Hosting is £18/month and covers SSL, weekly backups, security patches and uptime monitoring — optional, you can bring your own.
- [SEO — /seo](https://businesssortedkent.co.uk/seo): £45 an hour, billed from one hour a month. No retainer, no rolling contract. Local SEO, technical SEO, content, Google Business Profile work. You see exactly what got done and what moved.
- [Lead capture — /lead-capture](https://businesssortedkent.co.uk/lead-capture): Forms, instant replies, missed-call recovery, follow-up reminders. The bits that mean a busy day on the job doesn't cost you the work. Priced on the brief once we know what you handle now.
- [Automations and CRMs — /business-automation](https://businesssortedkent.co.uk/business-automation): CRM setup, job tracking, follow-ups, repeat invoicing, AI-assisted workflows. The repeat work that eats your Sundays, off your plate. Priced on the brief.

We cover Kent. The hub pages list every town and industry; a representative subset of the most prominent links below.

## Other services

- [Branding — /branding](https://businesssortedkent.co.uk/branding): A logo, palette and typography system that fits how you actually work. Priced on the brief.
- [Social media setup — /social-media-setup](https://businesssortedkent.co.uk/social-media-setup): Profiles set up the right way the first time, branded consistently, pointed at the work you want to win. Priced on the brief.
- [Digital marketing — /digital-marketing](https://businesssortedkent.co.uk/digital-marketing): Paid ads, content and email campaigns aimed at the customers you actually want to win. Plain monthly reports. Priced on the brief.
- [Workwear and print — /workwear-print](https://businesssortedkent.co.uk/workwear-print): T-shirts, polos, hi-vis, business cards, signage. Sorted at the same time as your website so it all matches.
- [AI chatbots — /ai-chatbots](https://businesssortedkent.co.uk/ai-chatbots): A chatbot that handles the basic enquiries your website gets every day. Books appointments, answers FAQs, hands off to you when it matters. Priced on the brief.
- [AI content — /ai-content](https://businesssortedkent.co.uk/ai-content): Blog posts, service pages and landing copy written with AI and edited by people who know what good writing looks like. Priced on the brief.
- [AI automation — /ai-automation](https://businesssortedkent.co.uk/ai-automation): Email triage, follow-up sequences, document drafting, data sorting. The repeating bits of your business. Priced on the brief.

## About and contact

- [About — /about](https://businesssortedkent.co.uk/about): Founder-led, plain-English positioning. Who hires us and why our prices are what they are.
- [Services and prices — /services](https://businesssortedkent.co.uk/services): Full list of what we do, with prices.
- [Contact — /contact](https://businesssortedkent.co.uk/contact): Send a message. Email: hello@businesssortedkent.co.uk. Phone: 07522 388055. We usually reply within a day.
- [Free preview — /free-preview](https://businesssortedkent.co.uk/free-preview): Recommended starting point. Submit your business details, we build a working preview of your new site before you pay.
- [Free website review — /free-website-review](https://businesssortedkent.co.uk/free-website-review): Manual review of your existing site. Send the URL, a human reviews page speed, mobile usability, Google indexing and conversion paths, and replies within 24 hours.

## What we don't do

- **No monthly retainers or rolling contracts.** Work is paid by the hour, by the project, or scoped to a written brief. There is no minimum commitment beyond the work itself.
- **No SLAs or guaranteed response windows.** Contact-form messages are usually replied to within a day, but this is not a written guarantee.
- **No vendor certifications claimed.** We are not a Google Partner, a Meta Business Partner, or any similar badge holder. We do the work; we do not collect logos.
- **No ongoing managed paid ad spend.** The /digital-marketing service is campaign work scoped to a written brief — building, copy, and reporting on Google Ads, Meta Ads and email campaigns. We do not act as an outsourced media buyer running monthly ad spend on a retainer.
